steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage shows that Franklin's popularity helped him persuade France. The blank must name what aspect of being “very popular” functions as a persuasive tool.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Esteem means respect and regard—precisely what “very popular” implies and what gives someone the standing to persuade others.

The other three either contradict the signal of popularity (controversy) or name character traits rather than the reputation needed to persuade (sincerity, thoughtfulness).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
